ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL link to the book's page */,
  "book_title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "book_image" TEXT /* Image URL for the book cover */,
  "book_desc" TEXT /* Description of the book */,
  "book_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the book */,
  "rating_count" INTEGER /* Number of ratings the book has received */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews the book has received */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the genres table */,
  "page_count" INTEGER /* Total number of pages in the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the book */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the book */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the book was published */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* International Standard Book Number (ISBN) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the book is written */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the book (e.g., hardcover, paperback, e-book) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "author_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "author_image" TEXT /* Image URL for the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_rating" REAL /* Rating given in the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for user authentication */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_books" (
  "user_book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-book relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the book (e.g., 'reading', 'read', 'want to read') */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the user started reading the book */,
  "finish_date" TEXT /* Date when the user finished reading the book */,
  "rating" REAL /* User's rating of the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_books_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_books_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Value of the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_genres" (
  "book_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_genres_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_users" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin user */,
  "admin_username" TEXT /* Username of the admin */,
  "admin_email" TEXT /* Email address of the admin */,
  "admin_password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for admin authentication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the book */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the book was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_access_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the recommendation */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended book */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share event */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sharing the book */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date when the book was shared */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform on which the book was shared (e.g., Facebook, Twitter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_shares_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the analytics data is recorded */,
  "total_users" INTEGER /* Total number of users on the platform */,
  "total_books" INTEGER /* Total number of books in the catalog */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews on the platform */,
  "total_ratings" INTEGER /* Total number of ratings on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "author_followers" (
  "follow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user following the author */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author being followed */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date when the author was followed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_author_followers_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_author_followers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_comments_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
